dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 5831 IH: To designate the facility of the United States Postal Service located at 306 South Main Street in Waupaca, Wisconsin, as the “Master Sergeant Melvin O. Handrich Post Office Building”.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Wied (for himself, Mr. Steil, Mr. Pocan, Mr. Van Orden, Ms. Moore of Wisconsin, Mr. Fitzgerald, Mr. Grothman, and Mr. Tiffany) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Oversight and Government Reform

form.official-title: To designate the facility of the United States Postal Service located at 306 South Main Street in Waupaca, Wisconsin, as the Master Sergeant Melvin O. Handrich Post Office Building.

section.header: Master Sergeant Melvin O. Handrich Post Office Building

subsection.text: The facility of the United States Postal Service located at 306 South Main Street in Waupaca, Wisconsin, shall be known and designated as the Master Sergeant Melvin O. Handrich Post Office Building.

Any reference in a law, map, regulation, document, paper, or other record of the United States to the facility referred to in subsection (a) shall be deemed to be a reference to the Master Sergeant Melvin O. Handrich Post Office Building.
